commands.repair_reason: Manual review is needed because automation cannot supply the contributor's live iMessage proof and the protected maintainer label plus local-read boundary need maintainer acceptance.; Cleared: No concrete vulnerability or supply-chain issue was found in the diff; the change remains security-boundary-sensitive because it authorizes configured inbound roots for image-tool reads. commands.review_summary:
The PR threads current channel/account context into the image tool and lets local media loading check separate channel inbound attachment roots with the existing inbound path policy.

PR surface: Source +65, Tests +153. Total +218 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and proposed regression tests: current main builds image-tool local roots without channel context, while iMessage already exposes attachment roots through the channel inbound contract. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is needed because automation cannot supply the contributor's live iMessage proof and the protected maintainer label plus local-read boundary need maintainer acceptance.
